info.title: Mo-nut API
info.summary: Contract-first API for Mo-nut Phase 1 and Phase 2 clients.
info.description:
This OpenAPI 3.1 document defines the canonical HTTP API surface for Mo-nut.
Contract payloads intentionally use snake_case for transport consistency across
generated clients and offline mutation envelopes.

tags.name: identity
tags.description: Session exchange, profile, and session management.

tags.name: consents
tags.description: Consent documents and patient consent records.

tags.name: caregivers
tags.description: Caregiver invitations, relationships, and active patient context.

tags.name: appointments
tags.description: Appointment scheduling, review, and state transitions.

tags.name: medications
tags.description: Medication records, schedules, doses, and adherence actions.

tags.name: assets
tags.description: Upload metadata, OCR, transcription, and draft confirmation.

tags.name: reports
tags.description: Report generation and secure share links.

tags.name: notifications
tags.description: Notification preferences and privacy-safe push subscriptions.

tags.name: sos
tags.description: SOS initiation, status tracking, and emergency profile access.

tags.name: sync
tags.description: Offline mutation batching and change feed retrieval.

post.summary: Exchange an external identity token for a Mo-nut session.

200.description: Session created and active profile resolved.

get.summary: Get the active Mo-nut profile context for the authenticated user.

patch.summary: Update user-level locale and accessibility preferences.

get.summary: List the active and recently revoked sessions for the authenticated user.

post.summary: Revoke one session for the authenticated user.

get.summary: Get the active consent document template for a given key.

data.title: Caregiver Access Consent
data.summary: Grant scoped appointment and medication access to a caregiver.
data.disclosure_text: Access can be revoked at any time and does not allow medication changes without explicit scope.

get.summary: List the patients available in the active user context.

post.summary: Create a patient profile for the authenticated account owner.

get.summary: Get a patient profile and emergency details.

patch.summary: Update mutable patient profile fields using optimistic concurrency.

get.summary: List consent records scoped to a patient.

post.summary: Create a consent record for a patient.

get.summary: List caregiver relationships for a patient.

post.summary: Invite a caregiver to one patient with scoped permissions.
Accept a caregiver invitation once.
Revoke a pending caregiver invitation.

get.summary: List active patient contexts available to the caregiver.
List appointments for a patient.

post.summary: Create a new appointment for a patient.

get.summary: Get one appointment.

preparation_items.label: Fast for 8 hours before blood draw.

patch.summary: Update an appointment, including soft-delete metadata.

post.summary: Perform an explicit appointment status transition.

get.summary: List medications for a patient.

post.summary: Create a medication record.

get.summary: Get a medication record.

data.warning_text: Do not change this medication without professional advice.

patch.summary: Update mutable medication fields with optimistic concurrency.

get.summary: List schedules for a medication, including immutable history.

post.summary: Create a new medication schedule revision.

get.summary: List dose occurrences for a patient.

post.summary: Submit an idempotent dose action for one occurrence.
post.description: Repeating the same Idempotency-Key with the same payload returns the original result.

200.description: Dose action applied or returned from idempotency storage.

post.summary: Apply an audited correction to a past dose status.

get.summary: List typed measurements for a patient.

post.summary: Create a typed health measurement entry.

get.summary: Get one measurement entry.
Get measurement summary and recent trend metadata.

post.summary: Create asset metadata and request a signed upload target.

201.description: Asset metadata created and upload target issued.

post.summary: Start an OCR processing job for an uploaded asset.
Start a transcription job for an uploaded audio asset.

get.summary: Get the status of one OCR or transcription job.

post.summary: Confirm a reviewed OCR or transcription draft before applying it.
Request asynchronous report generation for selected scopes.

get.summary: Get the current report job status.

post.summary: Create an expiring share link for approved report scopes.

get.summary: Resolve a public share link token without exposing patient identity when inactive.
Get privacy-safe notification preferences.

post.summary: Register a push subscription without storing detailed PHI in payload definitions.
Initiate an SOS event with per-channel delivery status.

202.description: SOS accepted with immediate delivery attempt results.

post.summary: Mark an SOS event closed.

get.summary: Get the privacy-controlled emergency profile summary for one patient.

post.summary: Submit a batch of offline-safe mutations with independent outcomes.

200.description: Batch processed with partial success, retryability, or conflict outcomes.

get.summary: Get incremental changes after a sync cursor.

bearer_auth.description: Application session token or verified bearer token issued by Mo-nut.

if_match.name: If-Match
if_match.description: Entity version token used for optimistic concurrency.

error.message: Authentication is required to access this resource.

forbidden_scope.description: The authenticated actor lacks the required role, scope, or consent.

error.message: The active role or consent scope does not permit this action.

suspended_account.description: The account is suspended and cannot continue.

error.message: This account is suspended and must complete recovery before access is restored.

validation_failed.description: The payload or domain fields are invalid.

error.message: One or more request fields are invalid.

version_conflict.description: The submitted entity version is stale.

error.message: The resource was updated by another session.

invitation_expired.description: The caregiver invitation is expired and can no longer be accepted.

error.message: The invitation expired before it was accepted.

invitation_already_used.description: The caregiver invitation has already been accepted.

error.message: This invitation token has already been consumed.

duplicate_relationship.description: The caregiver relationship already exists in active form.

error.message: An active caregiver relationship already exists for this patient and user.

invalid_state_transition.description: The requested appointment transition is not permitted from the current state.

error.message: The appointment cannot move from completed back to confirmed.

idempotency_conflict.description: The same Idempotency-Key was reused with a different payload.

error.message: The idempotency key was already used with a different request payload.

measurement_validation_error.description: The measurement unit or value is outside the accepted validation range.

error.message: The measurement value or unit is not accepted for the selected measurement type.

provider_failure.description: The upstream provider or processing adapter is unavailable or failed.

error.message: The external processing provider is unavailable. Retry or switch to manual entry.

share_expired.description: The share link expired and exposes no patient data.

error.message: This share link is no longer active.

share_revoked.description: The share link was revoked and exposes no patient data.

error.message: This share link has been revoked.

example.title: Caregiver Access Consent
example.summary: Grant scoped appointment and medication access to a caregiver.
example.disclosure_text: Access can be revoked at any time and does not allow medication changes without explicit scope.
